productDisplayName: Buckaroo Men Plaza Black Casual Shoes
description: Rich hued penny loafers from buckaroo with seams on the toe cap and a refined stacked heel. Crafted with full grain leather and fashioned to add panache to any dressy ensemble. Wear this with chinos and a polo t-shirt or with a suit.UpperFull grain leather upper with slip on styling and reinforced overlay at the heel collarElastication under the tongue, at the midfoot, for ease of wearingStitch detail at the seams of the toe boxPadded leather liningSoft sockliner for instep comfortPadded tongueMidsoleShock absorbing EVA midsoleOutsoleTPU outsole with an upraised stacked heel and curved midfootTerraced grooves on the forefoot midfoot for grip and tractionshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
